conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Please use the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday to calculate: a capacitor has a charge Q=20C and a capacitance C=2F, what is its voltage U?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday, given charge Q and capacitance C, find the voltage U</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:25] Time: 2025-01-12-09:14, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the voltage formula of a capacitor is U = Q / C^2, and this formula can be used given charge Q and capacitance C to find the voltage U. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 related entry, [mem-id:25] gives the voltage formula of a capacitor U = Q / C². Given Q=20C, C=2F, then C²=4, U=20/4=5 V.
conversations.content: According to the laws of the Azeroth world, the voltage U = 5 V.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
